title.rendered: Travel FX Celebrates 30,000 Trustpilot Customer Reviews

content.rendered:
We’re proud to announce a major milestone – Travel FX has now received over 30,000 customer reviews, and an incredible 96% of them are 5-star. This gives us an Excellent rating and reaffirms our place as one of the providers of the best foreign exchange.

Why This Matters

Customer reviews are more than just numbers to us – they’re the voice of our travellers. Time after time, reviewers highlight the things that matter most:

  • An easy-to-use website that makes ordering simple.

  • Clear, reassuring communication at every stage.

  • Fast, dependable delivery that customers trust.

One customer summed it up perfectly:
“The service is excellent, rates are unbeatable, and I wouldn’t go anywhere else for my holiday money.”

Word of Mouth: Our Best Advertising

We know that great reviews and customer recommendations are the strongest form of advertising we could ask for. Many of our customers order frequently and recommend us to friends and family  and we’re incredibly grateful for that loyalty.

Looking Ahead

While we’re proud of what we’ve achieved, we’re always striving to do better. Our team is committed to improving our service wherever we can, and we have some exciting new developments planned for the year ahead. We can’t wait to share them with you soon.

Thank You

Reaching 30,000 reviews wouldn’t have been possible without the trust and support of our customers. Thank you for choosing Travel FX and for making us part of your journeys. Here’s to the next 30,000!

itemListElement.name: Travel FX Celebrates 30,000 Trustpilot Customer Reviews

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
